package.name: uav_rl_guidance
package.description: Learned guidance law (GRU policy) for vision-based UAV interception. Drop-in replacement for uav_vision_png: same topics, same state machine, same CSV statistics format. The policy is trained in the lightweight kinematic gym (/home/verser/Python/guidance_rl) via BC + PPO, exported as TorchScript. A built-in PNG fallback takes over on policy anomaly (watchdog) or when fallback_png:=true (A/B baseline mode).
